title: epidendrum orthophyllum
intro: Epidendrum orthophyllum is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum orthophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions such as wounds and burns.
